title: Explorerflotte Create
description: A fabric based modpack focused on Create, Modern Industrialization, Botania and Applied Energistics with a lot of decorative options. Using Mods like Oh the Biomes, MCA and Phillipps Ruins/CTOV makes the world more interesting.
body:
# Explorerflotte Modpack

A fabric based modpack focused on Create, Modern Industrialization, Botania and Applied Energistics with a lot of decorative options. Using Mods like Oh the Biomes, MCA and Phillipps Ruins/CTOV makes the world more interesting.

Join our Discord at https://discord.gg/2YjCXRnJ
